title: GeoSpoof – your VPN hides your IP, but the browser leaks your location
abstract:
Hello HN,

I started building GeoSpoof after I noticed my IP says one country, but the browser still hands sites my real location. Websites were flagging me because of this discrepancy. I searched for a good geolocation spoofer, only to go down a rabbit hole that there are dozens of signals that yo
